title: Collection content should not be replaced unconditionally
description: Avoid replacing collection content unconditionally as it can lead to unexpected behavior.
message: Replacement of collection content without proper conditions may lead to unexpected behavior.
recommendation: Use appropriate conditions before replacing collection content.

noncompliant.description: Replacing values in a list unconditionally.

compliant.description: Replacing values in a list with appropriate conditions.

why_is_this_an_issue: Replacing collection content without proper conditions can lead to unexpected behavior, such as data loss, data corruption, or incorrect results.
how_to_fix: Ensure you have appropriate conditions before replacing collection content.

checks.message: Replacement of collection content without proper conditions may lead to unexpected behavior.
